programme.title: Lakshmi Nivas
programme.desc: S1 E108 Lakshmi abandons her affluent roots to build a selfless life with Shriniwas. Decades on, the couple work tirelessly to secure their own house and fund a grand wedding for their daughter.

programme.title: Vasudha
programme.desc: S1 E547 Though they have different perspectives, the amiable and endearing Vasudha works as a housekeeper in Chandrika, a business tycoon's house.

programme.title: Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile
programme.desc: S1 E296 Reet shockingly draws a gun on Sharda to obtain keys. Subsequently, Sharda relents and Reet claims this act upholds good triumphing over evil.

programme.title: Ganga Mai Ki Betiyaan
programme.desc: S1 E217 Ganga Mai, abandoned for bearing daughters, defies norms with fierce love and dignity, raising three girls who each forge bold, individual paths shaped by their dreams and inner fire.

programme.title: Saru
programme.desc: S1 E352 A kabaddi player with aspirations of becoming a district commissioner leaves Rajasthan for Mumbai to attend college, balancing her ambitions while fighting for her mother's rightful family status.

programme.title: Lakshmi Nivas
programme.desc: S1 E109 Lakshmi abandons her affluent roots to build a selfless life with Shriniwas. Decades on, the couple work tirelessly to secure their own house and fund a grand wedding for their daughter.

programme.title: Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile
programme.desc: S1 E297 Raghav's heroic save injures him while Unnati's forgery causes strife. Later, as the ruse unravels, Raghav chastises Unnati for her deceit.

programme.desc: S1 E218 After her husband abandons her for not giving birth to a son, a resilient Ganga Mai dedicates herself to raising her three daughters with unwavering strength, grace, and affection.

programme.title: Vasudha
programme.desc: S1 E332 Vasudha revels in her growing bond with Devansh, oblivious to danger. Meanwhile, Hanumant plots Vasudha's demise after destroying Devansh's presents.

programme.title: Vasudha
programme.desc: S1 E333 Devansh expresses joy at Vasudha's plans with her father, while inwardly lamenting her absence. Vasudha, too, silently reciprocates the sentiment of missing him.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol - Crime Patrol 48 Hours
programme.desc: S1 E35 The host narrates various crimes revolving around real-life incidents focusing on their first 48 hours, a crucial timeframe to solve the case.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol
programme.desc: S1 E799 Some of the best cases of 'Crime Patrol', which investigates how innocent people turn into criminals due to the influence of evil in society.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol
programme.desc: S1 E800 Some of the best cases of 'Crime Patrol', which investigates how innocent people turn into criminals due to the influence of evil in society.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol
programme.desc: S1 E801 Some of the best cases of 'Crime Patrol', which investigates how innocent people turn into criminals due to the influence of evil in society.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: S1 E1041 Sopan asks Gayatri about her books, and she refuses to reveal the truth. Later, Gayatri asks Sopan to reconsider his decision to stop her education.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: S1 E1042 Gayatri recites her poem at Dwarka Mai in front of Sai and others. Meanwhile, Sai imagines Gayatri in bridal attire and bursts into tears.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: S1 E1043 Gayatri is left dejected when her father decides to get her married against her will. On the other hand, Sai's followers organise an event at Shirdi.

programme.title: Mere Sai - Shraddha Aur Saburi
programme.desc: S1 E1044 In spite of his absence, Sai continues to be a source of inspiration for his followers. Elsewhere, Gayatri runs away from her house when her father decides to get her married.

programme.title: Tum Ho Naa - Ghar Ki Superstar
programme.desc: S1 E4 This is TV Show - Entertainment Category.

programme.title: Vashikaranam - Kis Par Rakhe Vishwas
programme.desc: S1 E34 In a remote village, Suman, a feared matriarch, secretly practises Vashikaran, an occult ritual believed to control people, and even spirits. As police investigate this, eerie events erupt.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol
programme.desc: S1 E18 Some of the best cases of 'Crime Patrol', which investigates how innocent people turn into criminals due to the influence of evil in society.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol
programme.desc: S1 E19 Some of the best cases of 'Crime Patrol', which investigates how innocent people turn into criminals due to the influence of evil in society.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol
programme.desc: S1 E723 A compilation of the best cases investigated in 'Crime Patrol' showcases people from different walks of life falling victim to the vices of others or their own.

programme.desc: S1 E36 Host Kapil Sharma invites celebrity guests, who discuss their latest movie projects, while keeping the audience laughing with his humourous take on several topics.

programme.title: Wheel of Fortune
programme.desc: S1 E13 Contestants put their minds to solving word puzzles after spinning a giant wheel that determines the monetary value they are playing for.

programme.title: Best of the Kapil Sharma Show
programme.desc: S1 E33 A compilation of the best moments from 'The Kapil Sharma Show' celebrates top highlights, playful roasts and the vibrant energy that defines its comedy.

programme.desc: S1 E135 A compilation of some of the most spine-chilling cases from 'Crime Patrol', which investigates murders, kidnappings and thefts among other heinous crimes.

programme.title: Indian Idol
programme.desc: S16 E53 Various talented participants from India compete against each other during a singing competition in order to impress the judges and win the title.

programme.title: Indian Idol
programme.desc: S16 E54 Various talented participants from India compete against each other during a singing competition in order to impress the judges and win the title.

programme.title: India's Got Talent
programme.desc: S11 E1 The judges are left impressed by the singing prowess of the three Italian women. Later, Joel Kaden comes up with a thrilling stunt, leaving the judges speechless.

programme.title: Best of Crime Patrol
programme.desc: S1 E847 A compilation of the best cases investigated in 'Crime Patrol' showcases people from different walks of life falling victim to the vices of others or their own.

programme.title: Yeh Rishta Kya Kehlata Hai
programme.desc: Dr Abhimanyu, a misogamist, finds himself getting attracted to Akshara, Kartik and Naira's daughter. Things take a tricky turn when Akshara's half-sister, Arohi, falls in love with him.

programme.title: Deewaniyat
programme.desc: Mannat and Jeet's love story takes a tragic turn, forcing her into marriage with the Chaudhary heir.

programme.title: Dil Ko Tumse Pyaar Hua
programme.desc: Deepika faces constant challenges from her stepmother and stepsister. Her kindness attracts Chirag, who falls in love and transforms her life.

programme.title: Iss Ishq Ka Rabb Rakha
programme.desc: Ranbir and Meghla, belonging to different cultural backgrounds, fall in love. While they strive to make their relationship work, they cope with the familial differences.

programme.title: Maati Se Bandhi Dor
programme.desc: A hard-working village woman, who labours in the fields to fend for her family, faces unexpected communal challenges when a man declines to marry her.

programme.title: Ghum Hai Kisikey Pyaar Meiin
programme.desc: Virat is an IPS officer who loves Pakhi deeply. However, things become complicated when he has to let go of his love, Pakhi, and marry Sai.

programme.title: Advocate Anjali Awasthi
programme.desc: Anjali Awasthi is a lawyer that struggles to achieve recognition in her field. But this desire to be recognised leads her to take on a challenging case that could help her achieve her dreams.

programme.title: Udne Ki Aasha
programme.desc: Though they get off to a bad start, an aspirational Saili and an unmotivated Sachin end up getting married. Saili then tries to turn her husband into a competent person.

programme.title: Yeh Rishta Kya Kehlata Hai
programme.desc: Different generations discover love in unique ways, shaping a story that evolves with time, reflecting tradition, change and the constant pull of family.

programme.title: Anupamaa
programme.desc: Anupamaa, who parts with her ambitions and goals in a bid to raise her family, feels dejected when she fails to get any credit for her sacrifices and trials. She then decides to live on her own terms.

programme.title: Jhanak
programme.desc: Jhanak tries to overcome her underprivileged background to fulfil her dream of becoming a dancer. However, a man she once rejected is out for revenge against her.

programme.title: Ghum Hai Kisikey Pyaar Meiin
programme.desc: Virat is an IPS officer who loves Pakhi deeply. However, things become complicated when he has to let go of his love, Pakhi, and marry Sai.

programme.title: Shaadi Sharte Lagu
programme.desc: Unfathomable circumstances thrust a self-willed, affluent young man and a woman from a humble background into getting married to each other..

programme.title: Diya Aur Baati Hum
programme.desc: After their marriage, Sooraj, a self-made man, supports and encourages Sandhya to achieve her dream of becoming an IPS officer despite his family's scepticism.

programme.title: Udne Ki Aasha
programme.desc: Though they get off to a bad start, an aspirational Saili and an unmotivated Sachin end up getting married. Saili then tries to turn her husband into a competent person.

programme.title: Yeh Rishta Kya Kehlata Hai
programme.desc: Dr Abhimanyu, a misogamist, finds himself getting attracted to Akshara, Kartik and Naira's daughter. Things take a tricky turn when Akshara's half-sister, Arohi, falls in love with him.

programme.title: Yeh Rishta Kya Kehlata Hai
programme.desc: Dr Abhimanyu, a misogamist, finds himself getting attracted to Akshara, Kartik and Naira's daughter. Things take a tricky turn when Akshara's half-sister, Arohi, falls in love with him.

programme.title: Kyunki Saas Bhi Kabhi Bahu Thi
programme.desc: Tulsi and Mihir Virani navigate the ensuing challenges that emerge in their family which has endured a lengthy passage of time.

programme.desc: Anupamaa, who parts with her ambitions and goals in a bid to raise her family, feels dejected when she fails to get any credit for her sacrifices and trials. She then decides to live on her own terms.

programme.title: Pandya Store
programme.desc: A middle-class family in Somnath relies solely on their grocery store for income. Faced with financial challenges, they unite to save the store and work together to pay off its debts.

programme.title: Ghum Hai Kisikey Pyaar Meiin
programme.desc: Virat is an IPS officer who loves Pakhi deeply. However, things become complicated when he has to let go of his love, Pakhi, and marry Sai.

programme.title: Maana Ke Hum Yaar Nahi
programme.desc: Khushi, everyone's favourite, unwittingly connects with conman Krishna through a wrong number, sparking an unexpected journey of love and adventure.

programme.desc: Mitti Kapoor Malhotra navigates personal and familial challenges as allegations against her husband test trust, love, and the pursuit of justice.

programme.desc: Anjali Awasthi is a lawyer that struggles to achieve recognition in her field. But this desire to be recognised leads her to take on a challenging case that could help her achieve her dreams.

programme.desc: An auto drivers hardships increase when his sisters marriage falls through.

programme.title: Andhaa Kaanoon
programme.desc: Two siblings, Vijay and Durga, choose contrasting paths to avenge their parents death.

programme.title: Juaari
programme.desc: The struggle against a dangerous gambling lord tests Dharam Singh and Vijay.

programme.title: Race
programme.desc: Ambition and romance intertwine as Santhosh faces challenges in love and career.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: A woman strives to balance her family responsibilities and emotional turmoils.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: An uneducated woman starts a business and tries to keep her family happy.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jehtalal, Popatlal and Bhide find Champaklal and bring him home safely. Next morning, when everyone is seen happy and enthusiastic, Popatlal does not look very happy, as he tells everyone.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: A young girl, along with her aunt, arrives at Gokuldham in search of Popatlal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The young girl reveals that her aunt wishes to marry Popatlal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal refuses to marry Gauri and later, distributes sweets at Abduls shop.

programme.title: Hui Gumm Yaadein Ek Doctor, Do Zindagiyaan
programme.desc: An accident leaves Dr Dev with an eight-year gap in his memory, forcing him to start over.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The residents of a housing society face real-life challenges and find solutions for it.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: A woman strives to balance her family responsibilities and emotional turmoils.

programme.desc: An uneducated woman starts a business and tries to keep her family happy.

programme.desc: Surbhi talks to the media about the womens police force team.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: Everyone is shocked when the police department decides to shut down the womens police force.

programme.desc: Pushpa becomes anxious after Haseena suddenly discovers her secret.

programme.desc: Haseena discovers that Pushpa has been taking the wrong medication for her condition.

programme.desc: Bhide denies the womens groups request for the terrace keys and Popatlal intervenes.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu Sena takes on the responsibility of cleaning the terrace for the Mahila Mandal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Departure plans for Bhide and the others are stalled by a mark on Popatlals attire.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal gets injured after losing his balance while trying to change his clothes.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Popatlal berates Bhide, prompting him to step down from his role as the society secretary.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Virat secures job to facilitate their lavish wedding while Anvita visits the eatery.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Anvita leads her family, sacrificing her dreams to care for five younger siblings.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: On the brink of her wedding, Anvita is blindsided by a surprise promotion.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Virat remembers his past after Sara shows up at his wedding ceremony.

programme.title: Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: Chiku is brought to the hospital where he receives treatment from Dr Dev.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal expresses profound uncertainty regarding the current location of Jethalal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Champaklal along with Tappu, Taarak, and Popatlal decide to go to senorita Island to find Jethalal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal clarifies to Champaklal the justification for not answering the phone call.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The peace in the society is disturbed after Popatlal tells everyone about a new scam.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide takes all the men from Gokuldham to the bank so that they can speak to the manager.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal and Bhide engage in a battle with each other to solve a few riddles.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bagha refuses to let Jethalal go to the godown after Nattu Kaka is kidnapped there.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal asks Baga to open the warehouse after Babita arrives to purchase something.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The kidnapper confesses why he kidnapped a writer to Jethalal and Bagha.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Gokuldham Society is full of quirky people who laugh and fight through every challenge.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Taarak narrates his kidnapping incident and mentions that Jethalals letter saved him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: After meeting the society members, the guests request them to gather in the Club House.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: Lord Kartikeya begs Mata Kali to end her destruction and shed her terrifying form.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: The gods continue their battle, while Ganesha tries to stop it with a trick.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: Tarakasur gathers the asura forces for a grand offensive against the devatas.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: Chaos erupts in the heavens as Tarakasur kidnaps Devasena; Devtas and the Asuras fight.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: The battle reaches its peak as Lord Kartikeya seeks to shatter Tarakasurs illusions.

programme.title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
programme.desc: Mata Chandi fights Nagasur, while Lord Kartikeyas conflict with Tarakasur persists.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: After chasing the wrong person, Karishma discovers that it is Misris doing as she has planted a mic on Santoshs uniform to eavesdrop on their plan. Watch ahead as Karishma starts calling.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: Inspector Bulbul Pandey arrives with a complaint against Haseena and Karishma.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: Tension rises as Haseena and Karishma refuse to hand over a case to Bulbul Pandey.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: Karishma and Haseena challenge Bulbul to a match of tug of war.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: Bulbul Pandey is incredibly pleased when he gets a public apology from Haseena.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: Karishmas senior tasks her with the responsibility of busting an illegal betting racket.

programme.title: Maddam Sir
programme.desc: Haseena offers to help nab Musa, but Karishma vehemently turns her down.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: Pushpa Patel, an endearing mother of three, faces lifes challenges with resilience and courage.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: Pushpa is accused of bribing a clerk which leads to her permits temporary revocation.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: Shanaya has found a way to deflect the accusation of stealing money from Ashwinis wallet.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: Shanaya formulates a fresh strategy to irritate Pushpa by utilising Ansh and Titli.

programme.title: Pushpa Impossible
programme.desc: Shanaya makes Ansh crush some chillies, causing him to get hospitalised.
